covert_cloak: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This cloak conceals the holder and protects it from the additional effects of moves.
eject_pack: An item to be held by a Pokemon. The holder switches out if its stats are lowered.
heavy_duty_boots: An item to be held by a Pokemon. These sturdy boots protect the holder from effects of traps set on the battlefield.
legend_plate: A stone tablet imbued with the essence of all creation. When used on a certain Pokemon, it allows that Pokemon to gain the power of every type there is.
loaded_dice: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It makes multistrike moves more likely to hit more times.
mirror_herb: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It copies an opponent's stat increases when consumed.
room_service: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It lowers the holder's Speed during Trick Room.
throat_spray: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It raises Special Attack when a sound-based move is used.
utility_umbrella: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This sturdy umbrella protects the holder from the effects of weather.
punching_glove: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This protective glove boosts the power of the holder's punching moves and prevents direct contact with targets.
cornerstone_mask: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Rock type during battle.
fairy_feather: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This feather boosts the power of the holder's Fairy-type moves.
hearthflame_mask: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Fire type during battle.
rusted_sword: It is said that a hero used this sword to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times, but it has grown rusty and worn.
rusted_shield: It is said that a hero used this shield to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times, but it has grown rusty and worn.
wellspring_mask: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Water type during battle.
ability_shield: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It protects the holder from having its abilities changed by other Pokemon.
